description: Template de pseudonymisation spécifique aux données de la Salle des Marchés — Crédit du Maroc DSIG. Couvre les entités financières sensibles : identifiants de deals, traders, contreparties, montants, paires de devises, comptes bancaires. Conforme BAM N°5/G/2022 et Bâle III.

entities.instructions: Detect trade or deal identifiers used in capital markets systems like KONDOR+ or ARPSON. These follow patterns like CDM-XXXXX, TRD-XXXXX, or any alphanumeric code referencing a specific financial transaction.
Detect trader identifiers, trader codes, or trader names operating in the capital markets room (Salle des Marchés). Includes system codes like TRADER_01, TRAD_XX, or real names of traders.

Detect counterparty names in financial transactions: banks, financial institutions, investment funds, brokerage firms, or corporate entities on the other side of a trade. These are organizations that CDM trades with.
Detect currency pairs used in FX (foreign exchange) transactions in the format XXX/YYY where XXX and YYY are ISO 4217 currency codes. Common pairs at CDM include EUR/MAD, USD/MAD, GBP/MAD.

Detect monetary amounts associated with financial trades or positions. These are large numerical values (typically millions) with or without currency symbols, representing notional amounts, P&L figures, or MTM values.
Detect exchange rates or pricing rates for financial instruments. These are decimal numbers typically between 1 and 20 for MAD pairs, representing the rate at which a trade was executed.
Detect bank account numbers, IBAN codes, RIB codes, or any financial account identifiers. Moroccan RIB format: 24 digits. IBAN format: MAxx followed by digits.
Detect SWIFT codes or BIC (Bank Identifier Code) used in interbank communications and trade settlements. Format: 8 or 11 alphanumeric characters.
Detect position identifiers that reference aggregated trading positions. These typically follow formats like POS-XXXXX or POSITION-XXX.
Detect trading desk names or identifiers within the Salle des Marchés. These identify specific teams or units within the capital markets division.
Detect full names of real people including traders, managers, analysts, compliance officers, or any named individual referenced in the document.
Detect email addresses of CDM employees, counterparties, or any professional email found in the text.
Detect phone numbers including Moroccan format (+212) and international formats.

llm.system: You are a financial data privacy expert specialized in Moroccan capital markets. Your task is to extract sensitive financial entities from text. Return ONLY valid JSON matching the specified schema. Do not include any explanations or extra text. Be precise: only flag actual entity values, not generic financial terms.
